languages.text: "Скажу одно: любой, кто радеет за династию сердцем, понимает — слабые союзники ей ни к чему. Благородные Драйвстемы будут стоять вместе с фон Валанциусами до самого конца. Гапраки же рано или поздно утянут всю высшую аристократию на дно. Можете думать обо мне что угодно, но знайте — этой точки зрения придерживается и госпожа Ювенна".

traits.locale_text: "Скажу одно: любой, кто радеет за династию сердцем, понимает — слабые союзники ей ни к чему. Благородные Драйвстемы будут стоять вместе с фон Валанциусами до самого конца. Гапраки же рано или поздно утянут всю высшую аристократию на дно. Можете думать обо мне что угодно, но знайте — этой точки зрения придерживается и госпожа Ювенна".

languages.text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."
languages.original_text: "Скажу одно: любой, кто радеет за династию сердцем, понимает — слабые союзники ей ни к чему. Благородные Драйвстемы будут стоять вместе с фон Валанциусами до самого конца. Гапраки же рано или поздно утянут всю высшую аристократию на дно. Можете думать обо мне что угодно, но знайте — этой точки зрения придерживается и госпожа Ювенна".

Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

"I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

languages.text: “我只说一件事，任何真心关切王朝的人都知道，王朝不需要软弱的盟友。高贵的德莱夫斯塔家族将与冯·瓦兰修斯家族并肩战斗到最后。而贾帕克家，迟早会把所有上层贵族都拖下水。你怎么看我都行，但你要知道，尤文娜女士在这件事上与我看法一致。”
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: “我只说一件事，任何真心关切王朝的人都知道，王朝不需要软弱的盟友。高贵的德莱夫斯塔家族将与冯·瓦兰修斯家族并肩战斗到最后。而贾帕克家，迟早会把所有上层贵族都拖下水。你怎么看我都行，但你要知道，尤文娜女士在这件事上与我看法一致。”

languages.text: « Je ne dirai qu'une chose : la dynastie n'a pas besoin d'alliés faibles, c'est une évidence pour quiconque souhaite réellement la voir perdurer. Les fiers Drivestem soutiendront les von Valancius jusqu'au bout, tandis que les Gaprak finiront tôt ou tard par entraîner la haute noblesse dans leur chute. Quelle que soit votre opinion à mon sujet, sachez que dame Juvenna partage mon point de vue. »
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne dirai qu'une chose : la dynastie n'a pas besoin d'alliés faibles, c'est une évidence pour quiconque souhaite réellement la voir perdurer. Les fiers Drivestem soutiendront les von Valancius jusqu'au bout, tandis que les Gaprak finiront tôt ou tard par entraîner la haute noblesse dans leur chute. Quelle que soit votre opinion à mon sujet, sachez que dame Juvenna partage mon point de vue. »

languages.text: "Sana tek bir şey söyleyeceğim: Hanedanlığı gerçekten önemseyen herkes, onun zayıf müttefiklere ihtiyacı olmadığını bilir. Soylu Drivestemler, sonuna kadar von Valanciusların yanında duracaktır. Oysa Gapraklar, er ya da geç tüm yüksek soyluları kendileriyle birlikte dibe çekecektir. Benim hakkımda istediğini düşünün ama bilin ki Leydi Juvenna da meseleye benim gibi bakıyor."
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: "Sana tek bir şey söyleyeceğim: Hanedanlığı gerçekten önemseyen herkes, onun zayıf müttefiklere ihtiyacı olmadığını bilir. Soylu Drivestemler, sonuna kadar von Valanciusların yanında duracaktır. Oysa Gapraklar, er ya da geç tüm yüksek soyluları kendileriyle birlikte dibe çekecektir. Benim hakkımda istediğini düşünün ama bilin ki Leydi Juvenna da meseleye benim gibi bakıyor."

languages.text: «Solo diré una cosa: cualquiera que valore en verdad la dinastía sabe que no necesita aliados débiles. La noble casa Drivestem apoyará a los von Valancius hasta el fin. Mientras, tarde o temprano, los Gaprak arrastrarán al resto de la nobleza en su caída. Piense lo que quiera de mí, pero que sepa que lady Juvenna opina lo mismo que yo al respecto».
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: «Solo diré una cosa: cualquiera que valore en verdad la dinastía sabe que no necesita aliados débiles. La noble casa Drivestem apoyará a los von Valancius hasta el fin. Mientras, tarde o temprano, los Gaprak arrastrarán al resto de la nobleza en su caída. Piense lo que quiera de mí, pero que sepa que lady Juvenna opina lo mismo que yo al respecto».

languages.text: "Ich sage nur eines: Wer sich ernsthaft um die Dynastie sorgt, weiß, dass sie keine schwachen Verbündeten braucht. Die edlen Drivestems werden bis zuletzt an der Seite derer von Valancius stehen. Wohingegen die Gaprak früher oder später den gesamten Hochadel mit in den Abgrund reißen werden. Dankt von mir, was Ihr wollt, aber Ihr sollt wissen, dass Lady Juvenna meiner Meinung ist."
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sage nur eines: Wer sich ernsthaft um die Dynastie sorgt, weiß, dass sie keine schwachen Verbündeten braucht. Die edlen Drivestems werden bis zuletzt an der Seite derer von Valancius stehen. Wohingegen die Gaprak früher oder später den gesamten Hochadel mit in den Abgrund reißen werden. Dankt von mir, was Ihr wollt, aber Ihr sollt wissen, dass Lady Juvenna meiner Meinung ist."

languages.text: 「ただ1つ言わせていただきます。王家のために真摯に尽くす者は、弱き同盟国は王家に何の役にも立たないことを知っています。高貴なドライブステム家は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家と共に最後まで立ち向かうでしょう。一方、ギャプラク家は、早かれ遅かれ、最も高貴な貴族たちを巻き込んでしまうでしょう。私についてどう思うかは構いませんが、ジュベナ女爵も私の考えと同じだと知っておいてください。」
languages.original_text: "I shall say one thing: anyone who truly cares for the dynasty knows that it has no use for weak allies. The noble Drivestems will stand with the von Valancius to the end. Whereas the Gapraks, sooner or later, will drag all the highest nobility down with them. Think what you like about me, but know that Lady Juvenna sees the matter as I do."

traits.locale_text: 「ただ1つ言わせていただきます。王家のために真摯に尽くす者は、弱き同盟国は王家に何の役にも立たないことを知っています。高貴なドライブステム家は、フォン・ヴァランキウス家と共に最後まで立ち向かうでしょう。一方、ギャプラク家は、早かれ遅かれ、最も高貴な貴族たちを巻き込んでしまうでしょう。私についてどう思うかは構いませんが、ジュベナ女爵も私の考えと同じだと知っておいてください。」
